final_text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. The fix is to add the `params` argument to the `ValidationError` call in the `to_python` method of `ModelChoiceField` so that the `%(value)s` placeholder can be substituted with the actual value that the user entered.

```json
{
  "file": "django/forms/models.py",
  "class": "ModelChoiceField",
  "method": "to_python",
  "parent_class": "ChoiceField",
  "fix_summary": "The to_python method should pass params={'value': value} to the ValidationError to enable %(value)s placeholder substitution in the error message."
}
```

parsed_answer.fix_summary: The to_python method should pass params={'value': value} to the ValidationError to enable %(value)s placeholder substitution in the error message.
